title: Castle Tour

segments.text: Welcome to Edgmont Castle, built in the twelfth century.
We will begin in the great hall, where banquets were held.
From there we'll move to the kitchens, then up to the chapel.
The tour finishes in the gardens.
Please stay with the group and do not touch the displays.
Photography is permitted everywhere except in the chapel.
The tour lasts approximately one hour.
Are there any questions before we begin?
